    S

    SecondaryParameter - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of the secondary electrical measurement parameters supported by the instrument, evaluating phase, dissipation, quality, or loss characteristics.
    SER - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.SeriesMode
     
    serial - Variable in class lcr.business.ETMeter
     
    SerialConnection - Class in lcr.business
    Low-level serial communication infrastructure that wraps jSerialComm routines to handle SCPI write/read transactions securely with the hardware meter.
    SerialConnection(String) - Constructor for class lcr.business.SerialConnection
    Initializes a serial port representation with standard LCR instrument connection settings.
    SerialDetector - Class in lcr.business
     
    SerialDetector(SerialDetector.OnPortDetectedListener) - Constructor for class lcr.business.SerialDetector
     
    SerialDetector(SerialDetector.OnPortDetectedListener, int) - Constructor for class lcr.business.SerialDetector
     
    SerialDetector.OnPortDetectedListener - Interface in lcr.business
     
    SERIES_RESISTANCE - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.DerivateInductance
     
    SeriesMode - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of the instrument's equivalent circuit model configuration, selecting between serial (SER) or parallel (PAL) parameter compilation.

    SHOW_LOGS - Static variable in class lcr.util.Constants
    System flag controlling runtime console logging stream operations.

    startMeasurementTimer() - Method in class lcr.business.MeasurementBusiness
    Spawns and initiates the background LCR hardware reader thread pool lifecycle.
    startMonitoring() - Method in class lcr.business.SerialDetector
     
    StatusBarPanel - Class in gui
    Status bar component that provides real-time connection status and instrument metadata.
    StatusBarPanel() - Constructor for class gui.StatusBarPanel
     
    stopMeasurementTimer() - Method in class lcr.business.MeasurementBusiness
    Signals the background loop worker to stop execution and attempts an immediate thread interrupt.
    stopMonitoring() - Method in class lcr.business.SerialDetector
     
    stopRecording() - Method in class lcr.business.CSVRecordingRunnable
    Signals the recording loop to stop gracefully.
    SupportedMeter - Enum Class in lcr.enums
    Representation of the different hardware instrument manufacturers and models officially supported by the application's driving communication layer layers.
    SYST - Enum constant in enum class lcr.enums.DisplayPage
